title: SK Hynix Rockets 14% Ahead of July 29 Earnings as Chip Stocks Rebound
excerpt: SK Hynix surged 14% Tuesday without a single company-specific headline, and the real test comes July 29 when its earnings either confirm or shatter the bulli...
content_html:
David Moadel

Tue, July 21, 2026 at 1:15 PM CDT 4 min read

Quick Read

  • SK Hynix stock ascended 14%, rebounding from a 10% monthly pullback as traders position ahead of the company's July 29 earnings report.

  • Micron (MU) stock surged 13% after the company posted 346% YoY revenue growth and guided Q4 revenue to $50 billion, signaling intact memory pricing power.

  • The upcoming SK Hynix earnings report is the binary catalyst to watch, with traders closely watching for HBM4 shipment commentary and pricing signals.

  • Act now: the analyst who called NVIDIA in 2010 just named his top 10 AI stocks — and SK Hynix didn't make the cut. Grab the names FREE today.

Shares of SK Hynix (NASDAQ:SKHY) jumped 14% to $172.80 in Tuesday afternoon trading, placing the Korean memory giant at the front of a broad AI chip and memory rebound. The move arrives despite no fresh company-specific catalyst.

Traders appear to be positioning ahead of SK Hynix's next quarterly report, expected on July 29. SK Hynix shares had pulled back 10% over the past month before today's bounce, mirroring a sharp selloff across memory and AI accelerator names.

SK Hynix, which trades in the U.S. as American depositary shares after gaining a domestic listing in 2026, is a leading supplier of high-bandwidth memory (HBM) to NVIDIA (NASDAQ:NVDA). That HBM franchise sits at the center of the AI compute stack, giving the stock outsized sensitivity to sector sentiment.

Memory Names Lead the AI Rebound

The bounce follows a Korea Composite Stock Price Index (KOSPI)-led global chip recovery that carried into U.S. trading. Direct DRAM peer Micron Technology (NASDAQ:MU) stock is up 13% Tuesday, extending a run fueled by Micron's blowout Q3 FY26 report.

Micron delivered $41.46 billion in revenue, up 346% year over year (YoY), with non-GAAP EPS of $25.11 and a stunning 85% GAAP gross margin. Furthermore, Micron guided Q4 FY26 revenue to $50 billion, plus or minus $1 billion, a signal that memory pricing power is intact.

Act now: the analyst who called NVIDIA in 2010 just named his top 10 AI stocks — and SK Hynix didn't make the cut. Grab the names FREE today.

CEO Sanjay Mehrotra declared that "Micron's record fiscal Q3 financial results and even stronger outlook for Q4 reflect the strategic value of memory in the AI era." That read-through supports SK Hynix, which competes with Micron and Samsung for HBM sockets on top AI accelerators.

Chip Peers Join the Move

The rally extends across the broader semiconductor complex. Advanced Micro Devices (NASDAQ:AMD) is trading 8% higher, Intel (NASDAQ:INTC) has climbed 8%, and Broadcom (NASDAQ:AVGO) is up 2%.

content_html_zh:
大卫·莫德尔

2026 年 7 月 21 日星期二下午 1:15 CDT 阅读时间 4 分钟

快速阅读

  • SK 海力士股价上涨 14%，从每月 10% 的回调中反弹，因交易员在该公司 7 月 29 日公布盈利报告之前建仓。
  • 美光 (MU) 股价飙升 13%，此前该公司公布的收入同比增长 346%，并将第四季度收入引导至 500 亿美元，表明内存定价能力完好无损。
  • 即将发布的 SK 海力士收益报告是值得关注的二元催化剂，交易员密切关注 HBM4 出货评论和定价信号。
  • 立即行动：2010 年致电 NVIDIA 的分析师刚刚列出了他心目中的十大人工智能股票，而 SK 海力士并未上榜。 今天免费获取名字。

周二下午的交易中，SK 海力士（纳斯达克股票代码：SKHY）的股价上涨 14%，至 172.80 美元，使这家韩国内存巨头处于人工智能芯片和内存全面反弹的前沿。 尽管没有新的公司特定催化剂，但这一举措还是到来了。

交易员似乎在 SK 海力士预计于 7 月 29 日发布下一个季度报告之前进行了建仓。 在今天反弹之前，SK 海力士股价在过去一个月内已回落 10%，反映出内存和人工智能加速器品牌的大幅抛售。

SK 海力士于 2026 年在国内上市后以美国存托股票身份在美国交易，是 NVIDIA（纳斯达克股票代码：NVDA）高带宽内存 (HBM) 的领先供应商。 HBM 特许经营权位于人工智能计算堆栈的中心，使该股票对行业情绪异常敏感。

内存名称引领人工智能反弹

此次反弹是在韩国综合股票价格指数（KOSPI）引领的全球筹码复苏之后出现的，这种复苏也影响到了美国交易。 直接 DRAM 同行美光科技 (NASDAQ:MU) 股价周二上涨 13%，延续了美光 2026 财年第三季度井喷报告推动的涨势。

美光科技实现收入 414.6 亿美元，同比增长 346%，非 GAAP 每股收益为 25.11 美元，GAAP 毛利率高达 85%。 此外，美光预计 2026 财年第四季度营收为 500 亿美元，上下浮动 10 亿美元，这表明内存定价能力完好无损。

立即行动：2010 年致电 NVIDIA 的分析师刚刚列出了他心目中的十大人工智能股票，而 SK 海力士并未上榜。 今天免费获取名字。

首席执行官 Sanjay Mehrotra 宣称：“美光创纪录的第三季度财务业绩以及更加强劲的第四季度前景反映了存储器在人工智能时代的战略价值。” 该通读支持 SK Hynix，该公司在顶级 AI 加速器上的 HBM 插槽方面与美光和三星竞争。

芯片同行也加入进来

此次涨势延伸至更广泛的半导体综合体。 Advanced Micro Devices (NASDAQ:AMD) 股价上涨 8%，Intel (NASDAQ:INTC) 上涨 8%，Broadcom (NASDAQ:AVGO) 上涨 2%。
